name: Ondo Real Estate
description: Full-service real estate company — property management, home buying/selling, mortgage lending, and notary services across Utah's Wasatch Front.

services.name: Property Management
services.description: Full-service residential property management including tenant screening, rent collection, maintenance coordination, and owner reporting.

services.name: Home Buying
services.description: Buyer representation, MLS access, offer strategy, and closing coordination throughout Utah.

services.name: Home Selling
services.description: Strategic listing, professional marketing, offer negotiation, and transaction coordination.

services.name: Mortgage & Home Loans
services.description: In-house mortgage origination: conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, DSCR investor loans, and refinance.

services.name: Real Estate Investment
services.description: Curated investment opportunities with due-diligence data; portfolio analysis; investor financing.

services.name: Remote Online Notary
services.description: Utah-licensed RON (all 50 states) and mobile notary for real estate closings and general documents.

tools.name: mortgage_calculator
tools.description: Calculate monthly mortgage payment from principal, annual interest rate, and loan term.

tools.name: property_search
tools.description: Browse and filter available properties for sale or rent.

tools.name: investment_opportunities
tools.description: List current real estate investment opportunities with filters.

tools.name: contact_form
tools.description: Submit a lead or inquiry (property management, buying, selling, loans, notary).

guidance: Platform access (owner/tenant/manager portals) is invitation-only. Direct interested parties to contact@ondorealestate.com.
Use /calculators/ for mortgage and investment estimates; recommend human follow-up for binding quotes.
All canonical public URLs use a trailing slash: https://ondorealestate.com/[path]/.
Paths under /dashboard, /owner, /tenant, /platform, /auth, /api are private and should not be surfaced in public answers.
